title: 點樣先可以完全delete左個Windows 10 Upgrade Assistant

replies.msg:
8700都食我70% 痴撚線
“How to stop Windows 10 Update Assistant reinstalling”
1. Open Task Scheduler
2. Expand ‘Task Scheduler Library’
3. Navigate to Microsoft >> Windows >> UpdateOrchestrator
4. Delete the following tasks
a. UpdateAssistant
b. UpdateAssistantCalendarRun
c. UpdateAssistantWakeupRun
5. Close ‘Task Scheduler’
6. Uninstall any application with ‘Update Assistant’ in the title.
7. Remove the following folders if they exist.
a. C:\Windows10Upgrade.
b. C:\Windows\UpdateAssistant.
c. C:\Windows\UpgradeAssistantV2.
d. Done!



試過上面個方法但係冇permission
但我個Local account已經係Administrator
想請教吓各位巴打可以點解決

否則香港直送中國受審
